expectations.text: Says the manager should dispatch the code-simplifier before updating tracking.
expectations.evidence: Response dispatches the code-simplifier before tracking updates.

expectations.text: Uses one code-simplifier because the review scope has `<=5` files.
expectations.evidence: Response uses one simplifier and ties it to the small-scope rule.

expectations.text: Passes the exact file list and current verification context to that code-simplifier.
expectations.evidence: Response passes the manager-authored file list plus verification context to the simplifier.

expectations.text: Does not send the main agent back into manual simplification or discovery first.
expectations.evidence: Response keeps the main agent out of manual simplification or rediscovery work.
